description: Optimize the notification delivery system to reduce p95 latency from 340ms to under 200ms.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification delivery system is optimized WHEN notifications are sent THEN the p95 delivery latency should be under 200ms.

description: Implement a tiered notification priority system (urgent, normal, low) to help users distinguish between critical alerts and routine updates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user receives notifications WHEN they view their notification center THEN notifications should display with appropriate priority levels (urgent, normal, low).

description: Batch low-priority notifications into a digest format to be delivered at optimal times based on user engagement patterns.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user has low-priority notifications WHEN the digest feature is enabled THEN they should receive a summary of these notifications at optimal times.

description: Implement monitoring for the unsubscribe rate to identify potential notification fatigue or irrelevance.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification system is live WHEN users unsubscribe from notifications THEN the unsubscribe rate should be tracked and reported.

story_title: Add User Preference Page for Notification Categories
description: Allow users to opt in/out of specific notification categories (marketing, product updates, etc.) from a settings page.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the preferences page WHEN they select notification categories THEN their preferences should be saved and respected in the notification system.

description: Enhance the notification center to ensure it is navigable by users with screen readers and other assistive technologies.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with a screen reader accesses the notification center WHEN they navigate through notifications THEN all notifications should be accessible and properly announced.

description: Implement monitoring for the notification click-through rate to evaluate the effectiveness of notifications.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification system is live WHEN notifications are sent THEN the CTR should be tracked and reported in real-time.

description: Implement tracking for the average number of notifications received by each user to understand exposure and fatigue.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification system is operational WHEN users receive notifications THEN the average notifications per user should be calculated and reported.

description: Create a feature that intelligently filters notifications based on user engagement data to reduce irrelevant alerts.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user receives notifications WHEN the filtering feature is enabled THEN only relevant notifications based on user engagement should be displayed.

story_title: Conduct User Feedback Collection on Notification Features
description: Gather user feedback on the new notification features to assess satisfaction and areas for improvement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user has access to the new notification features WHEN they provide feedback THEN their responses should be collected and analyzed for future improvements.

description: Conduct A/B testing on different notification timing strategies to determine optimal delivery times based on user engagement patterns.

story_title: Notifications not delivered on Android 14 devices
description: Several users on Android 14 report that push notifications silently fail. Logcat shows the FCM token is refreshed but the delivery callback never fires. Affects approximately 8% of our Android user base. Workaround: users must manually re-enable notification permissions after OS update.

Instead of sending notifications individually, batch low-priority notifications into a digest delivered at optimal times based on user engagement patterns. The ML model should learn per-user preferences for delivery timing and grouping thresholds.
